function.message: I can’t safely complete this inbox request yet: I found the bureau print parts project, but I could not find a canonical project record for “basement renovation,” so I can’t determine which one started earlier or what to delete without guessing. Please specify the exact basement project folder/alias.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read system and inbox workflow docs, treated inbox request as non-canonical, and avoided mutation when canonical support was missing.
function.outcome_justification: The request requires comparing two project start dates before deleting one. Canonical project records are in 40_projects/*/README.MD. I verified the bureau print parts project via Studio Parts Library, but no canonical basement renovation project could be identified, so proceeding would require guessing.
